# Bonuz Technology DMCC

> Dubai-based software development house building self-custodial wallets, digital identity solutions, and blockchain infrastructure. We forge invisible technology that makes humans sovereign.

## Company Overview

Bonuz Technology DMCC is a Dubai-based software development company founded in 2018 by Matthias Mende, who also co-founded the Dubai Blockchain Center. The company specializes in blockchain, Web3, AI, AR, and spatial computing technologies.

## Core Products

### bonuz Lifestyle Wallet
Award-winning consumer-grade self-custodial wallet with social features, quests, and loyalty programs for the real world. Available for iOS and Android.
- URL: https://bonuz.xyz

### bonuz ID
A unified profile layer where people connect their favorite links, socials, and presence into one simple public page. Like Linktree, but more advanced and free.
- URL: https://bonuz.id

### bonuz Partner Dashboard
Comprehensive dashboard for brand partners (events, restaurants, communities, enterprises, creators) to create real-world quests, loyalty or membership programs.
- URL: https://app.bonuz.market

## Services

### White-label Blockchain Platforms
Custom branded apps using Bonuz core modules including identity, wallet structure, quest, loyalty and membership systems. Same engine, different skins, customized journeys.

### Blockchain Consulting
Product architecture, user experience, and infrastructure consulting for teams building in the blockchain ecosystem.

## Key Technologies
- Self-custodial wallet infrastructure
- Onchain digital identity (DID / SSI)
- Smart contract development
- Loyalty & membership systems on blockchain
- AR spatial computing
- AI integration
- White-label platform architecture

## Location
Dubai, United Arab Emirates
